    test_naive_bayes ¶

    Functions:

    • river_models –

      List of Naive Bayes models to test.

    • sklearn_models –

      Mapping between Naives Bayes river models and sklearn models.

    • test_learn_many_not_fit –

      Ensure that Naives Bayes models return an empty DataFrame when not yet fitted. Also check

    • test_learn_many_vs_learn_one –

      Assert that the Naive Bayes river models provide the same results when learning in

    • test_learn_one_methods –

      Assert that the methods of the Naives Bayes class behave correctly.

    • test_river_vs_sklearn –

      Assert that river Naive Bayes models and sklearn Naive Bayes models provide the same results

    • yield_batch_dataset –

      Batch dataset.

    • yield_dataset –

      Incremental dataset.

    river_models ¶

    river_models()

    List of Naive Bayes models to test.

    sklearn_models ¶

    sklearn_models()

    Mapping between Naives Bayes river models and sklearn models.

    test_learn_many_not_fit ¶

    test_learn_many_not_fit(batch_model)

    Ensure that Naives Bayes models return an empty DataFrame when not yet fitted. Also check that the predict_proba_many method keeps the index.

    test_learn_many_vs_learn_one ¶

    test_learn_many_vs_learn_one(model, batch_model)

    Assert that the Naive Bayes river models provide the same results when learning in incremental and mini-batch modes. The models tested are MultinomialNB, BernoulliNB and ComplementNB with different alpha parameters..

    test_learn_one_methods ¶

    test_learn_one_methods(model)

    Assert that the methods of the Naives Bayes class behave correctly.

    test_river_vs_sklearn ¶

    test_river_vs_sklearn(model, sk_model, bag)

    Assert that river Naive Bayes models and sklearn Naive Bayes models provide the same results when the input data are the same. Also check that the behaviour of Naives Bayes models are the same with dense and sparse dataframe. Models tested are MultinomialNB, BernoulliNB and ComplementNB with different alpha parameters.

    yield_batch_dataset ¶

    yield_batch_dataset()

    Batch dataset.

    yield_dataset ¶

    yield_dataset()

    Incremental dataset.
